positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a friendly, bioluminescent nocturnal fox sitting amongst clusters of glowing mushrooms and ferns. The fox should have a clean, elegant silhouette with deep teal and burnt orange tones, contrasted by vibrant neon glow accents. The style should be inspired by Art Nouveau and modern nature illustrations, with strong, visible outlines and graphic clarity, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, balanced symmetry, low-angle view, studio lighting, high contrast, detailed etching lines.
